mapper.sql: pee.employee_id as pe_id, pee.school, pee.education, pee.enrollment_time, pee.graduation_time, pee.new_education_flag, pee.specialized_subject, pee.enrollment, pee.attribute1, pee.attribute2, pee.attribute3, pee.enabled_flag, pee.id, pee.create_time, pee.create_by, pee.update_time, pee.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.school as ${tAlias}_school, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.enrollment_time as ${tAlias}_enrollment_time, ${tAlias}.graduation_time as ${tAlias}_graduation_time, ${tAlias}.new_education_flag as ${tAlias}_new_education_flag, ${tAlias}.specialized_subject as ${tAlias}_specialized_subject, ${tAlias}.enrollment as ${tAlias}_enrollment, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from pm_employee_education pee left join pm_employee_education_temp peet on pee.id = peet.education_id and peet.enabled_flag = 1 and peet.check_flag = 'D' and peet.instructions_flag = 'U'
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_education (employee_id, school, education, enrollment_time, graduation_time, new_education_flag, specialized_subject, enrollment, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_education set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_time = #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, graduation_time = #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_education_flag = #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, specialized_subject = #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment = #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select peedu.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peedu.education) > 0 then peedu.education else null end as education, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peedu.enrollment) > 0 then peedu.enrollment else null end as enrollment, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peedu.school) > 0 then peedu.school else null end as school, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peedu.specialized_subject) > 0 then peedu.specialized_subject else null end as specialized_subject from pm_employee_education peedu join pm_employee pe on pe.id = peedu.employee_id where peedu.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( peedu.education,peedu.enrollment,peedu.school,peedu.specialized_subject ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
